response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong alignment with the Staff Software Engineer role, particularly in distributed systems, AI-driven development, and technical strategy. His recent work at re:cinq on AI-agent infrastructure and code generators directly matches the job's focus on agentic systems. While his experience spans diverse domains, his operational ownership, stakeholder collaboration, and hands-on leadership in high-throughput environments are compelling.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-driven engineering (re:cinq's MCP code generators and agentic workflows)
Deep expertise in distributed systems (Sociomantic's micro-services handling millions of requests/sec)
Strong technical leadership (Staff roles at re:cinq and Altom, founder of GISCollective)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of operational ownership (on-call, monitoring) in recent roles
No direct evidence of agile ceremony leadership (e.g., scrum champion rotation)
Breadth of experience may dilute focus on high-throughput reliability requirements
